hero_intro: Bath Economics Society is the academic, careers, and social home for economics students at the University of Bath.
panel_1: Post deadlines, event reminders, and committee updates in a clean rolling feed.
panel_2: Publish one newsletter each week with a headline, summary, and full archive body.
panel_3: Showcase sponsors and grow partnerships as the society expands.
section_title: Built for credibility and repeat visits.
section_copy: Every week the committee publishes fresh content so members always have a reason to come back.
pillar_academic: Talks, revision support, debates, reading groups, and guest speakers.
pillar_careers: Networking, alumni panels, employer sessions, and internship support.
pillar_community: Socials, collaborations, welcome events, and welfare initiatives.
